name: Dragon Ball Z Plush Figure Puar 22 cm | Dragon ball
description: 'Let's kick booty!' Puar has ditched Yamcha to become Youtooz's best friend! Making their debut and standing at 9 inches tall with long pointed ears, their pale blue tufted oval head contains a gleeful smile with small cheery eyes as their long whiskers hang down to either side. With little paws held close in front of their chest, creme markings cover their face, ears, belly and the tip of the long tails that curls to their front. This plush is packed to the seams with 100% PP cotton and is made of normal minky and felt materials, absolutely perfect for cuddling or being the perfect cheerleader to your battle! About Dragon Ball Z Dragon Ball Z is the Japanese anime based on the manga Dragon Ball written and illustrated by Akira Toriyama. It follows the story of Son Goku and his companions as they defend the Earth (and Universe) from numerous evils with each being worse than the last! All while striving to be the strongest around no matter who, or what, sees them as an obstacle in their path!
